items.front: Under 2-9-1, what is the ATIS phonetic letter sequence range?
items.back: Alpha through Zulu, used sequentially and repeated. Restart at Alpha after a broadcast interruption of more than 12 hours.

items.front: Under 2-9-2, list the three events requiring a new ATIS recording.
items.back: 1. Receipt of any new official weather (regardless of value change). 2. Runway braking action reports worse than current ATIS broadcast. 3. Change in any other pertinent data (runway change, approach in use, new/canceled NOTAMs/PIREPs).

items.front: Under 2-9-3, what three weather observation remarks must always be included in ATIS?
items.back: Lightning, cumulonimbus, and towering cumulus clouds.
